summary: Code review of 'Registrar Inseminação' module completed. CRITICAL BLOCKER: PostgreSQL not available (localhost:5432 connection refused). Dynamic/UI testing not possible. Code review verified all requested features are implemented correctly in code.

critical.issue: PostgreSQL not running on localhost:5432 - dynamic testing not possible

issues: Deprecation warning: use_container_width=True should be replaced with width='stretch' (Streamlit deprecating after 2025-12-31)

details: Filter by proprietário (selectbox line 3307 with 'Todos' option)
6-column layout: ref, local, motilidade, dose, disponível, +/-/valor controls
Disponível shows 'Disp X' accounting for already selected qty (line 3333, 3351)

feature_3_usar_button.description: Usar button adds only lots with qty > 0 and closes modal
details: Warning if no lot selected with qty > 0 (lines 3375-3377)
Merges with existing lines (sums qty) without duplicating (lines 3388-3396)

feature_4_main_page_lines.description: Main page shows insemination lines with edit/remove capabilities
details: Lines display ref, local, proprietario, disponivel (lines 3429-3430)

feature_5_add_line_merges.description: Adding line reopens modal and sums existing lot without duplicating
details: Modal considers existing qty when calculating 'restante' (line 3332-3333)
If lot already in linhas, qty is summed (line 3391)
If new lot, creates new entry (lines 3392-3396)

feature_6_stock_validation.description: Stock validation enforced at UI and DB level
details: Frontend: Prevents adding more than max_disponivel (line 3384-3386)
Frontend: number_input max_value set to max_disp (line 3449)
Frontend: + button disabled when qty >= max_disp (line 3463)
Backend: FOR UPDATE lock prevents race conditions (line 824)

feature_7_registrar_inseminacao_multipla.description: Multiple insemination registration in single transaction
details: Uses FOR UPDATE to lock rows (line 824)

critical_code_review_comments: All 7 requested features are implemented correctly in code
Transaction handling is proper with FOR UPDATE lock for concurrency safety
UI properly validates stock limits both in modal and main page
Mobile responsiveness: Streamlit columns may compress on mobile but no explicit mobile-specific styling found
No data-testid attributes on insemination module elements - testing relies on Streamlit's internal structure
action_items: BLOCKER: PostgreSQL database not available - UI testing cannot be performed
SUGGESTION: Configure DATABASE_URL environment variable for remote PostgreSQL or start local PostgreSQL service
MINOR: Replace deprecated use_container_width=True with width='stretch' before 2025-12-31 deadline

success_rate.frontend: N/A - Database blocking app load (shows error on page)

context_for_next_testing_agent: PostgreSQL database still unavailable (localhost:5432 connection refused). Code review confirms all 7 features for 'Registrar Inseminação' module are implemented correctly. To test dynamically, need DATABASE_URL configured for remote PostgreSQL or local PostgreSQL service started. Streamlit app is running on port 8501 but shows database connection error.
rca_of_issue: Environment blocker: PostgreSQL service is not running in the container. The .env file configures localhost:5432 but no PostgreSQL process exists. This is an infrastructure issue, not a code issue. Solution: Either start PostgreSQL service or configure DATABASE_URL for remote database.
